title: malus pisiformis
intro: Malus pisiformis, also known as the Chinese pear, is a deciduous tree native to China and parts of Asia. The bark and fruit of Malus pisiformis have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus pisiformis include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Malus pisiformis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the bark, fruit, or leaves of the tree.
